name: bixbox/module-order-split
description: Bixbox_OrderSplit - Magento 2 module: display vendor & warehouse area on product pages and split orders by (category, vendor, warehouse area).

suggest.magento/module-catalog: Provides the product EAV the module reads from. Required when installed into a Magento 2 store; not needed to run the standalone unit tests.

_comment: registration.php is intentionally NOT autoloaded here; it is only relevant when the module is installed into a real Magento (see app/code/Bixbox/OrderSplit/composer.json). This keeps the standalone unit-test bootstrap Magento-free.
